final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for a domestic financing roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, speaker is 奥特曼 (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "国内路演 / GP调性" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 高瓴资本 pitch deck visual language, 红杉中国 investor presentation tradition, 2020s Chinese tech unicorn roadshow templates; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be PPT cover layout with title, subtitle, and speaker attribution clearly positioned
Subject: must include 奥特曼 as the speaker name
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, confident, high-stakes investment atmosphere — exact tone is yours
Color palette: needs a GP-grade sophisticated direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" / "发布" / "奥特曼" and any roadshow-standard Chinese copy (融资宣发 / 路演 / 演讲人等)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve Chinese domestic roadshow conventions and GP-tier visual standards
Avoid: must avoid Western-centric Silicon Valley visual cliches, must avoid cartoonish or overly playful elements inappropriate for institutional investor audiences
